CREATE PROCEDURE y_csv_cb (inout r any, in inx int, inout cbd any) { if (cbd is null) cbd := vector (); cbd := vector_concat (cbd, vector (r)); };
CREATE TABLE test_csv (id int, name varchar(255), age int);
CREATE TABLE other_data (ref_id int, description varchar(255));
INSERT INTO other_data VALUES (1, 'Desc A'), (3, 'Desc B'), (2, 'Desc C');
SELECT * FROM (SELECT id, name FROM test_csv WHERE age >= 30) AS filtered JOIN other_data ON filtered.id = other_data.ref_id;
CREATE PROCEDURE y_csv_multi_cb (inout r any, in inx int, inout cbd any) { if (cbd is null) cbd := vector (); cbd := vector_concat (cbd, vector (r)); };
CREATE TABLE csv_test (column1 varchar(50), column2 varchar(50), column3 varchar(50));
h := null; csv_parse (CSV_TO_STRING(SELECT column1, column2 FROM csv_test), 'DB.DBA.y_csv_cb', h, 0, null);
